requests.title: Re-certification due
requests.detail: Quarterly recertification is due for a finance board-reporting source table.
requests.evidence: Certification expires today; executive dashboard queries observed this week.

requests.title: Tag policy violation
requests.detail: Classifier found PII columns without the required governed tag.
requests.evidence: Auto-tag confidence exceeded 0.92 for 6 columns.

requests.title: Lineage gap
requests.detail: Column-level lineage is missing for one downstream dashboard edge.
requests.evidence: Table lineage is present; column lineage coverage is incomplete.

requests.title: Quality regression
requests.detail: Freshness and currency-code checks failed after the last pipeline run.
requests.evidence: Lakeflow run 1029384 reported check currency_code_not_null failed.

requests.detail: Restricted table has an access exception pending quarterly review.
requests.evidence: Quarterly access review identified one grant requiring business justification.
